hda726c90g0c25g452bgb060g93e317228b62: So, now that you've killed for that thing, what will you do with it?
hdc1199d8g10bbg483bgbb90g3811cf460906: Zarys will pay handsomely for this. I'll bring it to her.
he0ddbb71g0d47g4ee9g89b6ge5f1cc14c593: Good. No point in lugging this thing around when we know there's a motivated buyer.
hbb60a4ebg5567g469fg95ecg899a0a840cf3: We've got more pressing matters to see to, after all.
h91b44a48g420bg460cg9f23g5f91798e4461: I'm sure it's rightful owner will be grateful if I can return this.
h1f5ac622gd9bdg41a3g9675g0ba7dbad56ba: Fine. But you better be the one carrying that thing - I'm not a pack mule.
h3ed2434eg7624g4617gafb1gcd446ff37e59: I reckon I can sell this for a tidy sum.
hc732aaa1g9ea4g492cga84cg23479fb3fb42: And hopefully you'll live long enough to enjoy it.
hb6406fc6g007dg4161g82e7gbac22d8ee50f: Break it open, of course. There's got to be something important inside.
hc246e6afgb353g469dga469gf13406793997: Oh, you don't even know what's in there? I thought we were about to find a cure, given how eager you were.

h6d47122ag90e2g4f1egb515g45ab403ff8fc: What do you intend to do with that thing, exactly? We should really be travelling as light as possible...
